name: api20100401application
description: Manage api20100401application — create a new application within your account, updates the application's properties, retrieve a list of applications representing an application within the requesting account. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: AccountSid
parameters.description: The SID of the [Account](https://www.twilio.com/docs/iam/api/account) that will create the resource.
